response.overview: After being abandoned by Shida (Amyza Aznan), Khalid's (Arash Mohd) life becomes chaotic as he is forced to work to support and raise Salina (Ummi Nazeera) who is only a few months old. Khalid raises Salina alone and is forced to keep secret the story about her mother who has been imprisoned for being involved in drug trafficking with her former lover. From childhood, Salina is close friends with Amir (Izzue Islam), the son of Zamani (Nik Ramly) who is also Salina's father's best friend. Although Amir is highly educated, he chooses to stay in the village to care for his mother, Halijah (Fazlina Ahmad Daud), and to fulfill his father's last request to marry Salina. Amir and Salina's marriage is not blessed by Halijah. Salina is often treated badly by Halijah who constantly accuses her of being disrespectful because she did not have the upbringing of a mother.
response.title: Rindu Kasih
